alpha.desc: Northern perspective showing the relationship between the primary structure, neighboring commercial buildings, parking areas, pedestrian corridors, and surrounding transportation routes|The property benefits from strong connectivity to the downtown street network and nearby commercial activity centers.

bravo.desc: Western perspective illustrating building orientation, parcel utilization, access points, and neighboring urban development|The surrounding environment consists of closely spaced commercial structures, public roadways, and pedestrian circulation routes common to a downtown business district.

charlie.desc: Southern perspective depicting potential service areas, rear building access points, utility infrastructure, and adjacent commercial development|Secondary access opportunities and operational support areas may be observed from this viewpoint.

delta.desc: Eastern perspective highlighting street frontage, customer access routes, pedestrian traffic areas, and the property's visibility from public rights-of-way|The building's position within a dense commercial corridor contributes to significant public exposure and accessibility.

nadir.desc: Mixed-use commercial property located within downtown Bend along NW Franklin Avenue|The site contains a developed commercial structure occupying a highly visible urban parcel with direct access to surrounding streets, sidewalks, and public infrastructure|Adjacent properties consist primarily of commercial, retail, office, restaurant, and hospitality occupancies characteristic of the downtown core.
